name: neural-cosmos
description: Neural Cosmos — a living business universe in 3D.

scripts.dev: (npm --prefix server run dev &) && npm --prefix client run dev
scripts.build: npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix client run typecheck && npm --prefix server run typecheck
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
